name: Autumnal Jalapeno Jelly
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup jalapeño pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Strain the mixture through a fine mesh sieve into a bowl or jar, pressing down on solids with a spoon.
5. Let the jelly cool at room temperature before transferring it to sterilized jars.
6. Seal the jars tightly and refrigerate until ready to serve.
